name: Curried Chicken & Mango Salad
recipeIngredient: 4 boneless, skinned chicken breasts (4 oz each)
1 cup Peeled cubed mango, papaya, or pineapple
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring water to a boil in a medium saucepan.
2. Add chicken and reduce heat. Simmer for 15 minutes or until tender. Remove chicken and let cool.
3. Cut the cooled chicken into ½-inch pieces and set aside.
4. In a medium bowl, combine yogurt, lime juice, honey, curry powder, salt, and pepper. Mix well.
5. Add mango and reserved chicken to the dressing and toss thoroughly.
6. Spoon salad onto lettuce-lined individual serving plates.
